# publishArticle <kbd>Mutation</kbd>

> Publish an article, transitioning it from DRAFT to PUBLISHED.
> 
> Sets `publishedAt` to the current timestamp and makes the
> article visible to all readers. The article must be in DRAFT
> or IN_REVIEW status — already-published articles cannot be
> re-published (use `unpublishArticle` first).
> 
> Triggers notifications to all workspace members who have
> subscribed to the article's category.

**Defined in:** `procedures.zmodel`

<details>
<summary>Declaration · <code>procedures.zmodel</code></summary>

```prisma
mutation procedure publishArticle(
    articleId: String
): Article
```
